steps: CW structure: one cell $e^{2k}$ in each even dimension $2k$, $k \geq 0$. All odd cells absent.
Chain complex: $C_{2k} = \mathbb{Z}$, $C_{\text{odd}} = 0$. All boundary maps are zero (since $C_{2k-1} = 0$).

This is the cohomology of the Eilenberg–MacLane space $K(\mathbb{Z},2)$; by contrast, $H^*(\mathbb{C}P^\infty;\mathbb{Z}) \cong \mathbb{Z}[\alpha]$ (a polynomial ring, not truncated), where $|\alpha| = 2$.
